loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing panel-level PQ breach counts and worst-case metrics aggregated from 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing event timeline for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing active power (kW) for the 6 live feeders; harmonic (THD) and power factor metrics are consumed from the shared PQ buffer by the AI narrative engine, not bound as individual scalar fields in this roster.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Voltage THD (vThd) columns (thd_voltage_r/y/b_pct) failed validation on this meter; showing Current THD (iThd) and PF only. Some panel members (UPS-06, UPS-07) have no data and will render blank.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic signature for feeders with data (UPS-01 to UPS-04, BPDB-01, BPDB-02); UPS-05 and UPS-06 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.
